calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Paul A. Vander Waerdt, Respondant/Plaintiff.
Melinda K. Patterson, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant, Visitation Valley Community Development Corp. with witness Jennifer Dhillon.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Melina K. Patterson, Esq. testifies on behalf of Visitation Valley Community Development Corp. The following documentary evidence is introduced.

Exhibit 1 - Black Binder containing agreements.

Paul A. Vander Waerdt testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced.

Exhibit A - Request for Payment of Judgment Documents.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken uder submission.

JPT Paul Guierrez, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported (525)
